title: Fresh Villagolems
description: This pack is an add-on of Fresh Animations that inverts Villagers and Iron Golems.
body:
![VILLAGOLEMS : FRESH ANIMATIONS EDITION](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c62827b4f88aaef7a7e46687b8f2758ed1a1c96.png)

#

> It's interesting that Villagers and Iron Golems have the exact same head models.
I wonder how it would look if their textures were inverted...

*Villagolems* is a simple ressource pack that exchanges completly the assets of Villagers/Zombie Villagers and Iron golems (textures and sounds).
Its purpose is to be cursed.

This version of the pack is an add-on of *Fresh Animation*.

# Dependencies

### REQUIRED MODS (you need one of the 2 options below)
- [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

### REQUIRED PACK
- [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations)

### KNOWN COMPATIBLE PACKS (with advised order for the packs)
1. [Working Armorers](https://modrinth.com/project/working-armorers)
2. [Zombie Villager Gloves](https://modrinth.com/project/zombie-villager-gloves)
3. [ Fresh Villagolems ]
4. [Fresh Sleeping Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/fresh-sleeping-villagers)
5. [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions)
6. [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
7. [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs)

### KNOWN UNCOMPATIBLE PACKS
- Villagolems Classic
- Villagolems Swapped
- Sleeping Villagers
- Baby Villagers
- Villager Variety

# External Credits
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
- [Ripped Villagers Iron Golems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ripped-villagers-iron-golems-ricardo-included) by [MehVahdJukaar](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mehvahdjukaar/projects)
- [Villager Mech](https://github.com/DMBuce/bucepack?tab=readme-ov-file#villager-mech) by [Buce](https://github.com/DMBuce/bucepack)
- [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs) by [Gouchnox](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/gouchnox)
